{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Lowgold bodyguards
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lowgold bodyguards]] use spears.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
